---
title: " "
listing:
  - id: featured-listing
    contents: uci-projects-portfolio/capstone
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    max-description-length: 600
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  - id: others-listing
    contents:
      - uci-projects-portfolio/BANA-200
      - uci-projects-portfolio/Customer-Social
      - uci-projects-portfolio/Data-Prog
      - uci-projects-portfolio/ML
      - uci-projects-portfolio/SCM
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-profile">
    <img src="profile.jpg" alt="Jinrui Zhang" class="hero-avatar">
    <h2 class="hero-name">Jinrui (Jerry) Zhang</h2>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Data Analyst &middot; Business Intelligence &middot; Machine Learning</p>
    <div class="hero-links">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jinrui-zhang-jerry/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/jerryzhang966/jerryzhang966" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<aside class="page-floral">
  <img src="floral.png" alt="" class="floral-img">
</aside>
```

::: {.project-cta}
Browse my projects below &mdash; **click any card to read the full case study**
:::

::::: {.portfolio-layout}

:::: {.portfolio-featured}
::: {#featured-listing}
:::
::::

:::: {.portfolio-others}
::: {#others-listing}
:::
::::

:::::
